newsArray.title: Sri Lanka name squads for West Indies tour: Kusal Mendis captains white-ball sides, Wanindu Hasaranga returns
newsArray.description: Sri Lanka have named their squads for an all-format tour of the West Indies next month and the most significant piece of news from the selection panel is a captaincy change in white-ball cricket. Kusal Mendis takes over the ODI leadership from Charith Asalanka and the T20I captaincy from Dasun Shanaka, with Kamindu Mendis named as his vice-captain across both formats. Dhananjaya de Silva continues to lead the side in Tests. Sri Lanka vs West Indies: The captaincy changes and what they mean Asala...

creator: amar bhalla
